title: [BUG] ExcelJS is not able to detect the dropdowns in datavalidations if the dropdown source is in another sheet
author: dharani7998
body:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/75964357/141131757-827541fb-d2a9-4aa6-8945-1603090c48c2.png)


When trying to see the dropdown validation defined in a cell, ExcelJS was not able to pick it up since the dropdown source values are in another sheet rather than the same sheet. Would be really helpful if this could be fixed! 

I have attached the file I tried it with. I was using 4.3.0 version
`<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/exceljs/4.3.0/exceljs.min.js"
        integrity="sha512-UnrKxsCMN9hFk7M56t4I4ckB4N/2HHi0w/7+B/1JsXIX3DmyBcsGpT3/BsuZMZf+6mAr0vP81syWtfynHJ69JA=="
        crossorigin="anonymous" referrerpolicy="no-referrer"></script>`


Thank you!

[datavalidation.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/7513450/datavalidation.xlsx)

comments.author: mlasy
comments.body:
+1 experiencing the same issue.
Even when just loading and saving, the dataValidation from the other sheet is lost.
I'd have a look into the issue but for sure could use some additional tips on how to solve it

comments.author: deepfaith
comments.body: +1 I hope we could get this working
